license_status: Source-available; no open-source license selected yet
summary: Monolith is a local-first AI workbench for testing, comparing, and evaluating local LLMs on real hardware.
audience: Technical users comfortable with Linux, Python virtual environments, llama.cpp, GGUF models, YAML configuration, and manual setup.
capabilities: Generated chat profiles from configured local models
Basic chat and test run logging
Local eval prompt suite browsing and imports
Agent Lab proposal, review, and read-only workflow scaffolding
Setup diagnostics through the UI and terminal-side checks
Workstation monitoring with graceful fallback for optional metrics
caveats: No GPU driver, CUDA, ROCm, or system runtime setup
No production multi-user or authenticated deployment model yet
